case_title: EDWIN OSWALDO REYES NAVARRO VS. ERICK DIAZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES NAVARRO, EDWIN OSWALDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, ERICK $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,615.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL TRANSFER TITLE AND POSSESSION TO THE DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY : A 2001 BMW LICENSE NUMBER 7 H E G 812. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT DIAZ, ERICK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARISA AYERDI. BOTH INTERPRETERS IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETERS HAVE AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, November 5, 2015, in Department 525:
Edwin Oswaldo Reyes Navarro, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Sandra Osorio. Court appointed Spanish interpreter, Margo Seely #301386, for Respondent/Plaintiff.

Erick Diaz, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witness Allan Diaz. Court appointed Spanish interpreter, Daniel Navarro #300802, for Appellant/Defendant.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Mr. Navarro testifies on his own behalf through Spanish interpreter Margo Seely and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Group exhibits: repair invoices, car title slip & registration (returned), 10/2014 smog test, and receipts for auto parts.

Appellant/Defendant, Erick Diaz testifies on his own behalf through Spanish interpreter Daniel Navarro and responds to the questions from the Court. No evidence submitted by
Mr. Diaz.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence submitted by Respondent/Plaintiff Mr. Navarro retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Judgment Entered
